nasb.text: then the priest shall give orders to take two live clean birds and cedar wood and a scarlet string and hyssop for the one who is to be cleansed.

esv.text: the priest shall command them to take for him who is to be cleansed two live clean birds and cedarwood and scarlet yarn and hyssop.

cnv.text: 就要吩咐人為那求潔淨的人，拿兩隻潔淨的活鳥、香柏木、朱紅色線和牛膝草來。

ccb.text: 要吩咐人为他拿来两只洁净的鸟、香柏木、朱红色线和牛膝草。
